raw_response: {"detections":[{"biasType":"Spin","biasedText":"Marjorie Taylor Greene Came So Close to Getting the Joke","explanation":"Mocking, interpretive framing of Greene’s understanding rather than neutral description."},{"biasType":"Opinion Statements Presented as Fact","biasedText":"The President Is Losing Control of Himself","explanation":"Presents an unverified, evaluative judgment about the president’s mental state as a declarative fact without attribution."},{"biasType":"Opinion Statements Presented as Fact","biasedText":"The Intellectual and Moral Decline of the American Right","explanation":"Sweeping value judgment about a political movement stated as fact in the author’s voice."},{"biasType":"Unsubstantiated claims","biasedText":"The Murky Plan That Ensures a Future War","explanation":"Claims the plan will guarantee a future war—an absolute causal assertion—without evidence in the headline."},{"biasType":"Mind reading","biasedText":"Elon Musk Is Trying to Rewrite History","explanation":"Imputes intent (“trying”) to Musk without attribution or sourcing."},{"biasType":"Mudslinging/Ad Hominem","biasedText":"President Piggy","explanation":"Uses an insulting epithet instead of a substantive description."},{"biasType":"Subjective Qualifying Adjectives","biasedText":"Zelensky's Blind Spot","explanation":"“Blind spot” is a metaphorical, value-laden characterization implying a deficiency."},{"biasType":"Subjective Qualifying Adjectives","biasedText":"The Wicked Bubble Has Burst","explanation":"“Wicked” is a loaded adjective that dramatizes and moralizes the subject."}]}

detections.biasedText: Marjorie Taylor Greene Came So Close to Getting the Joke
detections.explanation: Mocking, interpretive framing of Greene’s understanding rather than neutral description.

detections.biasedText: The President Is Losing Control of Himself
detections.explanation: Presents an unverified, evaluative judgment about the president’s mental state as a declarative fact without attribution.

detections.biasedText: The Intellectual and Moral Decline of the American Right
detections.explanation: Sweeping value judgment about a political movement stated as fact in the author’s voice.

detections.biasedText: The Murky Plan That Ensures a Future War
detections.explanation: Claims the plan will guarantee a future war—an absolute causal assertion—without evidence in the headline.

detections.biasedText: Elon Musk Is Trying to Rewrite History
detections.explanation: Imputes intent (“trying”) to Musk without attribution or sourcing.
Uses an insulting epithet instead of a substantive description.
“Blind spot” is a metaphorical, value-laden characterization implying a deficiency.
“Wicked” is a loaded adjective that dramatizes and moralizes the subject.
